roman-demo.title: Meeting a new person
roman-demo.goal: Introduce yourself, ask simple follow-up questions, and keep the conversation going.
roman-demo.situation: You meet a student from another country after class. Start a friendly conversation and learn basic information about each other.

example_dialogue.speaker: You
example_dialogue.text: Hi, nice to meet you. I'm Roman.

example_dialogue.speaker: Other person
example_dialogue.text: Nice to meet you too! Where are you from?

example_dialogue.speaker: You
example_dialogue.text: I'm from Russia. What about you?

key_phrases.meaning: вопрос о том, из какой страны или города человек
вопрос о специальности или предмете обучения
key_phrases.example: What do you study at university?
I study computer science. How about you?

roman-demo.teacher_notes: Encourage reciprocal questions and a natural flow.

user-demo.title: Coffee shop in London
user-demo.goal: Order a drink politely, ask for options, and pay.
user-demo.situation: You are in a coffee shop in London. You want to order a drink, ask about milk options, and complete the order politely.

example_dialogue.speaker: Customer
example_dialogue.text: Hello! Could I get a medium latte with oat milk, please?

example_dialogue.speaker: Barista
example_dialogue.text: Sure. For here or to go?

key_phrases.example: Could I get a latte, please?

key_phrases.meaning: вопрос о том, будете ли вы есть или пить на месте или брать с собой

user-demo.teacher_notes: Focus on polite requests and basic café interaction.
